fireEvent.title: Publish event
fireEvent.payloadHint: Empty object or schema/rows only — platform fills schema from descriptor.
invokeFunction.title: Invoke function
invokeFunction.inputHint: Empty rows — platform fills inputSchema from descriptor.
invokeFunction.federatedHint: Invocation is forwarded to the federation peer via proxy API.
functionJournal.title: Function invoke journal
functionJournal.subtitle: Function invokes when audit is enabled for the object
functionJournal.disabledHint: Enable audit on the object (Functions tab) or check platform settings
functionJournal.objectDisabledHint: Function audit is off for this object — enable the checkbox above
functionJournal.objectDisabledEmpty: Enable function audit for this object to record invocations
bindingJournal.title: Binding invoke journal
bindingJournal.subtitle: CEL rules and SQL binding refreshes (when audit is enabled for the object)
bindingJournal.disabledHint: Enable audit on the object (Bindings tab) or check platform settings
bindingJournal.objectDisabledHint: Binding audit is off for this object — enable the checkbox above
bindingJournal.objectDisabledEmpty: Enable binding audit for this object to record invocations
eventJournal.disabledHint: Enable event journal on the object (Events tab) or check platform settings
eventJournal.masterDisabledHint: Durable event history is off platform-wide (event-journal.enabled) — live feed still works
eventJournal.masterDisabledLiveHint: Durable history is disabled (event-journal.enabled). The live feed below still shows new events.
eventJournal.objectDisabledHint: Event journal is off for this object — enable the checkbox above
eventJournal.globalHistoryDisabledHint: Platform-wide history requires event-journal.cassandra.global-table — live feed only
eventJournal.objectDisabledEmpty: Enable event journal for this object to record fired events
